objectives.text: Find the exit to the Ziggurat Encampment (town)
Find and kill Rootredge
Find the Orok campsite and loot the rare basket
notes: Event name 'Azak Campfire' — kill the two rares

objectives.text: Find the hanging tree and loot the magic corpse
Talk to everyone and exit into the Jungle Ruins
Find the exit to Venom Crypts (near waypoint)
notes: Do NOT go through — only take checkpoint and waypoint.

objectives.text: Find and kill the Mighty Silverfist
Find the exit to the Infested Barrens
notes: Do NOT go through — only take checkpoint

objectives.text: Go to the Infested Barrens
Find the exit to Chimeral Wetlands
notes: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to Azak Bog
notes: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Matlan Waterways
notes: Waypoint of Barrens is here

objectives.text: From whichever you find last, take the waypoint and portal back to Jungle Ruins
Enter the Venom Crypts
Find the corpse for the Venom Phial, then go back to town
Turn in Vial at Servi for a reward
notes: Reward is permanent and cannot be changed later

objectives.text: Go to the Azak Bog
Find the Flameskin ritual and activate all
notes: If not found before boss, skip it — but don't miss if found beforehand

objectives.text: Find and kill Ignagduk
Go back to town and then to Chimeral Wetlands
Find the temple/Trial of Chaos
notes: Enter zone, take waypoint, waypoint back to Wetlands. Do trial any time from now on.

objectives.text: Find and kill the Chimaera boss
notes: Found by following the left-hand border of the zone

objectives.text: Enter Jiquani's Machinarium
notes: Behind the Chimaera boss

objectives.text: Find the first small soul core, then open the door
notes: Either left or right of Alva

objectives.text: Find two more small soul cores
notes: Four in total, only two needed. Third door is gold/chest, fourth has no use.

objectives.text: Find the exit towards Jiquani's Sanctum
Find and kill Blackjaw
Checkpoint port to the exit, then go to Jiquani's Sanctum
Activate the waypoint right after the entry
Talk to Alva
Find two medium soul cores
notes: Soul cores are completely random in the zone.

objectives.text: Activate both generators
notes: Always to the left and right back (relative to Alva).

objectives.text: Checkpoint back to Alva
notes: Wait until second soul core arrives at Alva (red lines on ground).

objectives.text: Kill Zicoatl, Warden of the Core and loot the large soul core
Go back to the Infested Barrens waypoint
Insert the large soul core and go to Matlan Waterways afterwards
Activate every single lever to navigate through the zone, then activate the big one at the end
Port back to town
Go down the stairs near the well / the Hooded One
Talk to Alva, enter the Drowned City
FOLLOW THE ROADS!
notes: Zone is huge, but roads make it bearable — find everything eventually.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Molten Vault
notes: Enter, take waypoint, backtrack. Only first character per league.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Apex of Filth
notes: Enter, take waypoint, backtrack. Only first character per league.

objectives.text: Enter the Molten Vault
notes: Only first character per league.

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth
Find and kill the boss, then talk to Oswald back in town
notes: Only first character per league

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth
Find and kill the Queen of Filth, then portal back to town
notes: Zone layout is a huge spiral, clockwise or counterclockwise. After 360° of spiral, find boss.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs near the well / the Hooded One again, and enter the Temple of Kopec
Go up the stairs twice, then kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
notes: Stairs in corners of triangle zone. Stay in shade to avoid damage.

objectives.text: Talk to Alva and ride the elevator up
Go through the gateway, then down the stairs again to enter Utzaal
The Sacrificial Heart can randomly drop in this zone
notes: If not found, go to next zone. Don't farm here until it drops.

objectives.text: Search and kill Viper Napuatzi
notes: Always towards right end of zone, facing north.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Aggorat and enter Aggorat
notes: Always top right end of zone, facing north.

objectives.text: Follow the voices of the Trial of Atziri (on the big plaza), go through to find the next checkpoint
notes: Having sound on is beneficial!

objectives.text: Find the exit towards the Black Chambers
notes: After big plaza, seems to be top left end of zone.

objectives.text: Find the Sacrificial Table
notes: After big plaza, seems to be top right end of zone.

objectives.text: The Sacrificial Heart can randomly drop in this zone
notes: If not found until now, continue killing until found.

objectives.text: Checkpoint port to the Sacrificial Table, loot the dagger, place the heart, stab the heart
Checkpoint port to the Black Chambers, enter the Black Chambers
Find and defeat Doryiani, Royal Thaumaturge
notes: Always top left or top right, depending on entry angle.

objectives.text: Go through the Portal to the encampment, speak with Doryani
After the cataclysm speak with him again, then speak with the Sin
Talk to Alva to get to Act 4 (Kingsmarch)
